name: Lemon Chiffon Pie/b h and G
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: Better Homes & Gardens Cookbook:
1. In a saucepan, combine gelatin with 1/2 cup sugar and salt.
2. Stir over medium heat until the mixture is dissolved.
3. Add yolks, lemon juice, and water; stir until combined.
4. Cook the mixture on low heat until it comes to a boil.
5. Remove from heat and stir in lemon peel.
6. Allow to cool completely.
7. In a separate bowl, beat egg whites until soft peaks form.
8. Gradually fold the gelatin mixture into the beaten egg whites.
9. Gently fold in the whipped cream.
10. Pour the batter onto the cooled pie shell.
11. Chill until firm.
